title: Method and apparatus for improving critical dimension variation
abstract: A method is described. The method includes obtaining a relationship between a thickness of a contamination layer formed on a mask and an amount of compensation energy to remove the contamination layer, obtaining a first thickness of a first contamination layer formed on the mask from a thickness measuring device, and applying first compensation energy calculated from the relationship to a light directed to the mask.
claims: 1. A method, comprising: performing a first lithography process using a mask in a lithography system; idling the mask for a period of time, wherein a contamination layer is formed on the mask; measuring a thickness of the contamination layer formed on the mask; and performing a plurality of second lithography processes using the mask having the contamination layer, comprising: directing a first light from a first light source to the mask and a first substrate, wherein the first light has a first energy; directing the first light to the mask and a second substrate, wherein the first light has a second energy substantially less than the first energy; directing the first light to the mask and a third substrate, wherein the first light has a third energy substantially less than the second energy, and the contamination layer is removed; directing the first light to the mask and a fourth substrate, wherein the first light has a fourth energy substantially less than the third energy; and directing the first light to the mask and a fifth substrate, wherein the first light has the fourth energy.
